# Dataset card

## Identity and governance

- Dataset name/version/digest:
- Owner/steward/contact:
- License and dependency/source terms:
- Collection authority and ethics record:
- Consent version, exact purpose, and prohibited secondary uses:
- Data classes, sensitivity, retention, export/backup/deletion policy:
- De-identification method and residual re-identification risk:

## Acquisition and references

- Participants/cohort and recruitment:
- Sessions, rooms, days, devices, sites:
- Hardware/firmware/kernel/AP/channel/bandwidth/geometry/calibration:
- Packet stimulus and acquisition profile:
- Reference sensors and quality criteria:
- Synchronization method and alignment uncertainty:
- Environmental/task/self-report timestamps:

## Transformations and quality

- Source manifest and artifact digests:
- Parser/DSP/feature/preprocessing versions:
- Exclusions, missingness, interference, motion, saturation, OOD:
- Accepted/degraded/rejected counts:
- Known errors, coverage limitations, and unsupported populations/sites:

## Partition and leakage controls

- Frozen split-manifest digest:
- Grouping keys: participant/session/room/day:
- Development/validation/test counts:
- Leakage-test evidence:
- Read-only evaluation enforcement:

## Intended use and limitations

- Permitted research/validation purpose:
- Explicitly unsupported claims and uses:
- Baseline comparisons required:
- Expiration/requalification triggers:
- Deletion and correction history:

Review/sign-off and immutable card digest:
